title: ADB Extension
shortDescription: Control connected Android devices directly from Command Palette — no terminal needed.
description:
ADB Extension for Command Palette brings Android Debug Bridge commands to your Windows Command Palette. Browse installed apps, install APKs, uninstall, launch, force-stop, clear data, grant/revoke permissions, launch deep links, take screenshots, toggle developer options, airplane mode, Wi-Fi, mobile data, and mark favourite apps for quick access.

Built this because I kept alt-tabbing to a terminal for the same five ADB commands. Hope others find it useful too.

Requires ADB installed and available in your PATH.
